lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I buy a beer please?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Sure, that will be 2 gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you heard any rumours here?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Well, there was a guy in here earlier saying the goblins up by the mountain are arguing again, about the colour of their armour of all things.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Knowing the goblins it could easily turn into a full blown war, which wouldn't be good. Goblin wars make such a mess of the countryside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if I have the time I'll go and see if I can knock some sense into them.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Are you sure? You look a bit skinny for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just give me whatever I need to drink here.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Ok one Black Skull Ale coming up, 8 coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 8 coins with me.
